mechanism_narrative: Persistent near-zero FEDFUNDS compresses the equity risk premium by eliminating safe-haven yield alternatives, forcing capital reallocation into risk assets and producing positive S&P 500 20-day forward returns.
failure_condition: 20-day forward positive return frequency fails to exceed 55% in low-rate buckets (t-test p > 0.05) over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When UNRATE exceeds 9.5%, labor market slack triggers negative wealth effects and rising corporate default risk that overwhelms policy support, generating negative S&P 500 60-day forward returns.
failure_condition: S&P 500 produces positive 60-day returns in more than 50% of instances when UNRATE > 9.5% during walk-forward testing.

mechanism_narrative: Joint month-over-month contraction in both real retail sales (RSAFS) and industrial production (INDPRO) signals a synchronized demand-supply collapse that amplifies downward earnings revisions, producing negative S&P 500 20-day forward returns.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS and INDPRO both decline month-over-month
failure_condition: Negative 20-day forward returns occur in fewer than 45% of months where both RSAFS and INDPRO contract simultaneously over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Under the zero lower bound regime, month-over-month acceleration in CPIAUCSL signals successful disinflation avoidance and reflationary stabilization, generating positive S&P 500 5-day forward returns.
failure_condition: Positive 5-day forward return frequency remains below 52% during triggered zero-lower-bound periods over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production (INDPRO) month-over-month indicates manufacturing capacity utilization recovery and operating leverage expansion that boosts corporate margins, generating positive S&P 500 20-day forward returns.
failure_condition: Positive 20-day forward returns occur in fewer than 55% of months with rising INDPRO over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month housing starts (HOUST) rising above 600 thousand units signals durable goods demand recovery and construction employment inflection, generating positive S&P 500 60-day forward returns.
failure_condition: Positive 60-day forward returns occur in less than 55% of instances when HOUST exceeds 600 thousand units over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Quarter-over-quarter growth in real GDP (GDPC1) signals broad-based final demand expansion that drives top-line revenue beats across sectors, generating positive S&P 500 20-day forward returns.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC between GDPC1 growth and 20-day forward returns falls below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month acceleration in nonfarm payrolls (PAYEMS) above 100 thousand signals labor market escape velocity that drives consumption growth expectations and positive earnings revisions, generating positive S&P 500 5-day forward returns.
failure_condition: Positive 5-day forward returns occur in less than 55% of months when PAYEMS monthly change exceeds 100 thousand over any 2-year rolling window.
